Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: tools for wood-cutting and -finishing [300162913], woodworking tools [300163324], woodworking equipment [300163322], equipment by material processed [300168082], equipment [300122241], Tools and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300022238], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: knives [300024668], cutting tools [300024662], cutting equipment [300163290], equipment by process [300024659], equipment [300122241], Tools and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300022238], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Cleaving tools whose handles are at a right angle to the blade; used in conjunction with a froe club for splitting wood.
Kliefgereedschap waarvan de handvatten in een rechte hoek staan ten opzichte van het blad. Worden samen met een kloofhamer gebruikt om hout te klieven.
Spaltwerkzeug, dessen Griff im rechten Winkel zur Klinge sitzt; wird in Verbindung mit einem Schlegel zum Spalten von Holz verwendet.
